routes.label: Today
routes.purpose: Dagstart, release health, open risico’s en high-priority review work.

routes.label: Monitor
routes.purpose: Nieuwe candidates, source families, evidence gaps en monitoringstatus.

routes.label: Investigate

routes.label: Review

routes.purpose: Executive brief, evidence appendix, graph snapshots en machine-readable exports.

routes.label: Admin
routes.purpose: Release manifest, update flow, backend hardening, audit en tests.

review_queue_policy: single-item approval; no bulk publication without exportable review patch
